tests.action: Power on / boot through app_init(), init_serial(), init_tft(), and ui_create()
tests.expected_result: Firmware reaches Ready state; serial prints 'Coin Toss setup done'; UI shows title 'Coin Toss', result label 'Tap Flip', and enabled 'Flip Coin' button
tests.automation_method: wokwi-cli run with serial assertion and screenshot diff of the Ready UI

tests.action: Tap the on-screen 'Flip Coin' button twice on the target hardware
tests.expected_result: After the first tap the serial log shows 'UI: Flip button clicked', 'INTEGRATION: Flip pressed -> evButtonClick', and 'COIN: Heads' or 'COIN: Tails'; lblResult updates from 'Tap Flip' to 'Heads' or 'Tails'. After the second tap a new 'COIN: <result>' line is logged and lblResult updates again. btnFlip is disabled only while the state machine is in Flipping.
tests.automation_method: Manual tap on the CYD2USB target; observe the serial output and the on-screen result label
tests.serial_expect: Each tap produces 'UI: Flip button clicked', 'INTEGRATION: Flip pressed -> evButtonClick', and one 'COIN: Heads' or 'COIN: Tails' line (two COIN lines total)
tests.reset_action: Power-cycle target device and wait for 'Coin Toss setup done'.

tests.action: Trigger evReset (reset request when ui_ready is true)
tests.expected_result: System returns to Ready state; lblResult text is 'Tap Flip'; lblTitle remains 'Coin Toss'; btnFlip is visible and enabled; no error screen appears
tests.automation_method: manual reset button or host-driven reset pulse on the target, observed via serial and screen

tests.action: Trigger evDisplayFail at runtime (TFT driver reports failure after successful init)
tests.expected_result: System transitions from Ready to Error_Display; screen shows red full-screen 'ERR: Display init failed'; serial logs the runtime failure
tests.automation_method: manual hardware test by briefly disconnecting the display cable after boot or by injecting a driver fault if the driver exposes one

tests.action: Review the coin_flip() implementation and observe the COIN: output during the on-target manual flip test
tests.expected_result: coin_flip() returns only coin_side_t::HEADS or coin_side_t::TAILS; no other values are possible. The implementation uses esp_random() % 2u, so the distribution is non-deterministic across runs.
tests.automation_method: Code review of src/state_machine/coin_logic.cpp plus manual observation of the serial COIN: output during T03_FLIP_SEQUENCE
tests.prerequisite: Code review of src/state_machine/coin_logic.cpp; on-target observation via T03_FLIP_SEQUENCE if hardware is available
tests.notes: No host/native PlatformIO test environment exists, so the original host shim approach is not feasible. The production coin_flip() implementation is verified by code review and by observing the COIN: output during the manual T03_FLIP_SEQUENCE.

tests.action: Trigger evDisplayFail (TFT_eSPI missing or tft.begin() returns false)
tests.expected_result: System enters Error_Display state; screen clears to black then shows a red full-screen 'ERR: Display init failed' label; lblTitle, lblResult, and btnFlip remain hidden/disabled; serial logs the error
tests.automation_method: manual hardware test with display disconnected, corrupted User_Setup.h, or known-bad pin mapping
tests.reset_action: Power-cycle the target device with the display init path forced to fail (disconnect display or corrupt User_Setup.h)

tests.expected_result: System enters Halted state and reboots; screen goes black; after restart the boot message 'Coin Toss setup done' reappears and the app returns to Ready state
tests.automation_method: manual reset button or host-driven reset pulse while in Error_Display

tests.action: Trigger evTouchFail (XPT2046 missing or touch.begin() returns false)
tests.expected_result: System enters Error_Touch state; screen shows a red full-screen 'ERR: Touch init failed' label; lblTitle, lblResult, and btnFlip remain hidden/disabled; serial logs the error
tests.automation_method: manual hardware test with touch controller disconnected or known-bad touch pin mapping
tests.reset_action: Power-cycle the target device with the touch init path forced to fail (disconnect XPT2046 CS/TCLK/TDIN)

tests.expected_result: System enters Halted state and reboots; screen goes black; after restart the boot message 'Coin Toss setup done' reappears and the app returns to Ready state
tests.automation_method: manual reset button or host-driven reset pulse while in Error_Touch

tests.action: Trigger evTouchFail at runtime (touch driver reports failure after successful init)
tests.expected_result: System transitions from Ready to Error_Touch; screen shows red full-screen 'ERR: Touch init failed'; serial logs the runtime failure
tests.automation_method: manual hardware test by briefly disconnecting the touch cable after boot or by injecting a driver fault if the driver exposes one
tests.reset_action: Power-cycle the target device and allow it to boot to Ready, or replay T01_BOOT, before injecting the runtime touch failure

execution_notes: T01_BOOT is the only automated Wokwi test; it verifies boot to Ready state via the serial message 'Coin Toss setup done'.
T03_FLIP_SEQUENCE cannot be automated in Wokwi because the wokwi-xpt2046 part type is unsupported by the Wokwi CLI. It is executed as a manual hardware test.

T02_COIN_FLIP_HOST cannot be executed because platformio.ini has no host/native test environment. It is verified by code review of src/state_machine/coin_logic.cpp and by observing the COIN: output during the on-target manual T03_FLIP_SEQUENCE.
All other tests (T04–T10) remain manual because they require fault injection or reset actions that are not supported by the available simulator.

untestable_transitions.reason: Wokwi CLI does not model XPT2046 touch controller.
Wokwi CLI does not model XPT2046 touch controller.
